scripts.postinstall: rm -rf quartz && cp -r node_modules/@jackyzha0/quartz/quartz quartz && mkdir -p node_modules/@jackyzha0/quartz/quartz/.quartz-cache && rm -rf quartz/.quartz-cache && ln -sf ../node_modules/@jackyzha0/quartz/quartz/.quartz-cache quartz/.quartz-cache && cp -r quartz-custom/. quartz/
